Off Calendar Feb-10-2014 Continued To Apr-02-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove-Up Hrg; Brief
Off Calendar Feb-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.

Genvieve D. Dong, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, DIAMOND HEIGHTS VILLAGE ASSOCIATION.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) CHRISTOPHER LAGRAND AND JEANINE S. POQUIS.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Priscilla Aguilar sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) Christopher LaGrand as follows:
Damages: $16,126.00
Recoverable costs and fees in the amount of $2,145.00
A award of ongoing amounts is herby entered in the amount of $15.00 a month and 1% interest.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) Jeanine S. Poquis as follows:
Damages: 28,128.86
Recoverable costs and fees in the amount of $3,020.00
A award of ongoing amounts is herby entered in the amount of $432.00 a month and 1% interest a month.

Court signed Judgment in open court.
